message:
fix(ftui-pty): suppress clippy::result_large_err on tungstenite callback

The ErrorResponse size is dictated by tungstenite's accept_hdr_with_config
callback API — we cannot box the error variant without changing the external
interface. Added #[allow] with justification comment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
